narration: Most people swipe their HSA card at the doctor and call it a day. That's the mistake — and the number it's costing you is nearly $400,000.
visual: HSA card being swiped at checkout, then big red X over it, then $395,000 figure appearing on dark background

narration: Here's what nobody tells you — your HSA is the only account in America with a triple tax advantage. Money goes in tax-free, grows tax-free, and comes out tax-free.
visual: Three green shields labeled CONTRIBUTE, GROW, WITHDRAW spring in one at a time on light background

narration: Here's the secret — you can invest every dollar in your HSA in index funds, just like a 401k. But 68% of HSA holders leave their money sitting in cash earning almost nothing.
visual: Bar chart comparison on dark background: flat red CASH bar versus towering green INVESTED bar growing dramatically

narration: Put in $4,150 a year and invest it at 7% for 30 years? You're looking at $395,000 — completely tax-free. That's the number 68% of people are leaving on the table.
visual: Animated counter climbing from $0 to $395,000 with green piggy bank on light background

narration: Here's the bonus nobody mentions. After 65, your HSA becomes a second IRA — groceries, travel, anything at all. Just pay normal income tax, no penalty.
visual: Person silhouette with age 65 badge on dark background, three items revealed: Groceries, Travel, Anything at all

narration: This open enrollment, check if your employer offers an HSA-eligible plan. Max it out and invest it — don't spend it. Follow for more money moves they never teach you.
visual: Open enrollment form SVG with HSA-eligible plan checked on light background, three-step action list appearing
